name: Datasette (SQLite Data Explorer)
pricing_notes: Open source (Apache 2.0); Simon Willison; Datasette Cloud available

auth.notes: Optional API tokens; anonymous read by default; auth plugins available

performance.notes: SQLite read performance; excellent for sub-100MB databases; not for write-heavy workloads

agent_readiness.notes: Tool for instantly publishing SQLite databases as browseable, queryable web APIs. Run `datasette data.db` to get REST API, SQL query interface, JSON/CSV export, and web UI. Plugin ecosystem (datasette-vega, datasette-write, datasette-auth-tokens). Auto-generates JSON API from any SQLite table. Supports SQL execution via GET /?sql=. Used for data journalism, research data publishing, internal tools. Works with sqlite-utils for data import.

gotchas: Read-only by default (datasette-write plugin needed for mutations)
Not designed for high-concurrency write workloads (SQLite limitation)
Plugin quality varies widely in ecosystem
best_when: Publishing datasets as instantly queryable web APIs
Data journalism and research data sharing
Internal tools for exploring SQLite databases
Quick prototyping of data APIs without writing API code
summary: Datasette instantly publishes SQLite databases as browseable web applications and JSON REST APIs. Run one command to get a SQL query interface, JSON/CSV export, and pagination. Rich plugin ecosystem. Auto-generated API from any table schema. Used by data journalists, researchers, and teams needing quick read-only data APIs. sqlite-utils companion library handles data import and transformation.
